arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham Hotspur and West Ham United keen on €20m Serie A defender
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and West Ham United are both eyeing Juventus defender Federico Gatti, as the Italian club looks to raise funds for their own summer transfer plans. According to TV Play, the Premier League sides are interested in securing Gatti’s services, with a potential price tag of around €20 million. The report also highlights that […] The post Report: Tottenham Hotspur and West Ham United keen on €20m Serie A defender appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Premier League fixtures directly after Europa League games as final route mapped out
arts.sum: Following the Europa League round of 16 second leg at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Thursday, March 13, Spurs will be on the road in the Premier League as they make the trip across the capital to take on Fulham. As the first leg, which will be played at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, is in the calendar for Thursday, May 1, Tottenham won't have to travel far for their Premier League game directly after the European match as they will be remaining in the capital.

arts.ttl: Midfielder admits he would have preferred Manchester United over Tottenham in Europa League draw
arts.sum: AZ Alkmaar captain Jordy Clasie has shared his delight at drawing Tottenham in the Europa League, even if he’d have prepared Manchester United. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from the Ziggo Sport following the Europa League draw on Friday. arts.ttl: Team News: Ipswich Town vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Ipswich Town and Tottenham Hotspur.

We've got now two games in quick succession in the league, a good opportunity for us to get some match minutes into guys who have been out for a while. We played them here (in the league phase) and obviously watched that game (AZ against Galatasaray) and the Real Sociedad game (against Midtjylland) knowing they were likely opponents.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou urges Tottenham to build on recent Premier League results
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has hinted Pedro Porro and Dejan Kulusevski could be rested for the Portman Road clash.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's latest on Cristian Romero Micky van de Ven, Richarlison and Dominic Solanke
arts.sum: "He's had a scan, it's going well, he's in a good place. Then we have a week before the first Europa League game (Round of 16 first leg vs AZ Alkmaar on 6 March) and that's about the time we're hoping that guys like Romero, Micky in particular, they should be in and around that mark, with Richy and Dom not too far behind.

arts.ttl: Man United handed Sociedad in UEL; Spurs get AZ
arts.sum: Manchester United have been drawn to face Real Sociedad in the Europa League round of 16, while Tottenham Hotspur will take on AZ Alkmaar.
